violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Foods were observed stored on the floor in the retail area and in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The (ceiling tiles) in the (store front) area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
